subcodes.first_line: The wine of divine utterance hath seized the pure and sanctified souls, and the illumined and spotless hearts, of them who are the desire of all worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رحیق بیان مقصود عالمیان نفوس مطهره مقدسه و قلوب منوره طاهره را اخذ نموده
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @wisdom [hikmat]
